title: Copper Made In A Night
description: A short and sweet mod about Minecrafts most useless item in the game... Copper! This mod adds a new copper block and a new redstone item as well as new tools and a item that can strike lightning down for 1 use.
body:
# Welcome to COPPER MADE IN A NIGHT!
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f9dbb05296e7281f68d0e085038e394a4dc9565.png)
This mod is about copper, minecrafts most **USELESS** ore! But _how?_ by including some snazzy new items that could help you mine or even give you effects! But thats not all theres also items with cool **SPECIAL** effects! Like a pickaxe that can give enemys slowness 4 when hit!
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
# Check out the video on the mod!  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Su9Ersha3I8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
# IMPORTANT INFO:
_This is a **SERVER AND CLIENT** sided mod! It cannot be ran on a server without you AND the server having the mod installed. This is not like Sodium wheres its client sided, this mod HAS to be ran by the server and you having it installed._

This mod is going to get updated around every 2-3 months
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
# Most recent version includes:

- Copper core (Item that can zap down lightning in a instant for 1 use).
- Quartz pickaxe.
- Copper Axe.
- The Grid (Redstone block).
- Slingshot (Uses Infused Gas To Work).
- Fuse.
- Incased Gas.
- Bolted Copper Block.
- Potion of Stabilization
- Copper Rod
- Reinforced Copper Rod
- A painting called "Voted Out"
- Copper Button
- Wire
# And many more to come!
Support me and my work by subscribing to my youtube channel! [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJzY4ogA0OBE8-0HR6_M3qg](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJzY4ogA0OBE8-0HR6_M3qg)
